enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual life update vlog covering two days: yard/house work including helping at three houses and a long bike ride (~10 miles each way), helping his mom clear plants around her rose bushes, watching Orange Is the New Black, and working on a cricket enclosure system for his reptiles. He also shares plans for his website and future reptile acquisitions.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Finds it really entertaining; calls the casting brilliant
Enthusiastic; planning to expand his collection when finances allow

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I love living in Boulder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I forgot to do a viewlog yesterday morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wasn't home until like nine in the afternoon yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was too tired and stoned to do the viewlog yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, I think I visited three houses.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wrote out a long mind yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked on my own yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked out in the morning yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I rode my bike all day back, about 10 miles out and back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It was stountrying, so we didn't know.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I built part of my little cone.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We went into the other place and organized the furniture and the lawn.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went over to my mom's house and dug up plants around her rose bushes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had dinner at my mom's house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We watched episodes of 'Orange is the New Black'.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom is really into 'Orange is the New Black'.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The casting in 'Orange is the New Black' is brilliant.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I came home tired.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to ride about eight miles away or something.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm ready for the weekend.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I come home from work, I'll just work on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got six more cricket containers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I get a thousand crickets from a new company.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I built my little cone thing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have a couple of crickets running around my house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can get more different reptiles when I have the money, like next year.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might get a chameleon or a bearded dragon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I could pick birds and put plastic leaves all over my room to make it look like a jungle.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Maybe I'll even get a humidifier.
